_comment: qa_move_again.json — QA: p1 piece at (4,5) holds ['move_again']. Inputs: (1) click (4,5) to select, (2) activate 'move_again' (immediate, no target) — sets extra_move flag, current_player stays 1; (3) click (4,4) to move — should NOT flip current_player (extra_move consumed, player moves again). Expected final state: current_player==1 (turn NOT flipped), piece at (4,4), status=='playing'.
